semantic.role: Infrastructure-level authentication stub providing placeholder login, logout, and a singleton AuthService class for early development and testing.
responsibilities: Expose a public logout function that prints a placeholder message to the console.
Expose a public login function that accepts a user string and a password (ignored) and prints a placeholder message.
Provide a singleton AuthService class via a static getInstance method for future injection.
invariants: All exports must remain importable without side effects.
Exported symbols must not change name or signature without a major version bump.
Only console.log is used for output (no side effects on external systems).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a minimal authentication interface for future integration with real authentication backends.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial stub implementation of auth module to establish the public API surface.

publicSurface.description: Prints a placeholder logout message to the console. Intended as a stub for future real logout logic.
Accepts a username and password (both strings), prints a placeholder login message. The password is ignored; this is a stub for real authentication.
A class with a static getInstance method returning a new instance. Placeholder for a real authentication service singleton.
